name.en-US: ERS-Interact-Flex Elsys LoRaWAN Interact Flex Panel
name.pt-BR: ERS-Interact-Flex Painel Interact Flex LoRaWAN Elsys

description.en-US: Elsys ERS-Interact-Flex — LoRaWAN (Class A) indoor sensor that monitors temperature, humidity and button presses. Uplinks are Elsys TLV frames on FPort 5.
description.pt-BR: Elsys ERS-Interact-Flex — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) de ambiente interno que monitora temperatura, umidade e acionamentos de botão. Os uplinks são quadros TLV Elsys no FPort 5.
